subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O my God and the God of all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, and all thanksgiving be unto Thee, O my Sovereign and the Sovereign of all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی و اله من فی السموات و الارض و لک الشکر یا سلطانی و سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @law of fasting, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
